title: Powercoin Creative items! (Palladium)
description: PowerCoin is a small Palladium addon that adds six creative-only, unobtainable items for use in quests, progression, and custom mechanics. Originally made for Ampel by Green for the ProjectX server.
body:
PowerCoin is a small addon for the Palladium mod that introduces six creative-only, unobtainable items. These items are designed specifically for quests, progression systems, admin-controlled rewards, and custom mechanics, without affecting normal survival gameplay.

The addon exists to give modpack creators and server owners flexible reward or currency items that cannot be obtained or exploited through standard gameplay. Because the items are creative-only, they are ideal for controlled environments where balance, progression pacing, or storytelling is important.

PowerCoin was originally created for the ProjectX server by Green for Ampel and is tailored toward curated modpacks and multiplayer servers that rely on structured progression or narrative-driven content.

This project is especially useful for quest rewards, NPC trades, progression milestones, and admin- or story-driven mechanics. It is not intended for normal survival use.

Important information before downloading:

* The addon adds exactly six items.
* All items are creative-only and unobtainable in survival.
* The ThreeTAG Palladium Core is required.
* The addon is designed for the ProjectX Palladium modpack but may be adapted for other controlled setups.

👉 Made for the ProjectX Palladium modpack:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/projectx-palladium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/projectx-palladium)

💬 Join the ProjectX community / server Discord:
[https://discord.gg/5MwsRu2b2v](https://discord.gg/5MwsRu2b2v)

Requires:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
